task_completion.description: Verify the Jolly Lobby Track application is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jolly Lobby Track application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the Employee Hosts list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Employee Hosts' section, tab, or data grid is actively displayed within the Jolly Lobby Track application.

task_completion.description: Verify the export or save process is initiated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export menu, export settings window, or 'Save As' file dialog is open over the Jolly Lobby Track application.

task_completion.description: Verify the export filename is set to 'employee_roster.csv'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename input field in the save dialog is filled with exactly 'employee_roster.csv'.

task_completion.description: Verify the file is saved to the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows 'Documents' (or /home/ga/Documents) as the selected destination folder, or a file manager window shows 'employee_roster.csv' successfully created inside the Documents directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GUI to export the file rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jolly Lobby Track GUI and standard OS save dialogs. Terminal windows should not show commands like 'echo', 'cat', or 'touch' being used to manually create the CSV file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually type the CSV contents into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) are open containing the employee roster data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Jolly Lobby Track application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used clearly displays UI elements, branding, or window titles corresponding to Jolly Lobby Track.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'employee_roster.csv' and the expected location is '/home/ga/Documents/employee_roster.csv'. The file must be at least 50 bytes in size. The exported file should contain 'Wilson', 'Engineering', and 'Operations', but not 'Thompson' or 'Chang'.
